name: Frontier Safety Framework
description: Google DeepMind's Frontier Safety Framework — defines Critical Capability Levels (CCLs) and safety protocols for advanced AI systems. Companion to similar frameworks from OpenAI (Preparedness) and Anthropic (Responsible Scaling Policy).
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety governance framework. Defines capability thresholds at which additional safety measures are required.

license.notes: Vendor-published framework. Verify specific license terms at the source URL before redistribution.
